The stellar circle or group presided over by the Wind-God
consists of the seven constellations viz.. UttaraphalgunI, Hasta,
Citra, Svati, Punarvasu, Mrgasirsa and AsvinI, (this means that if
there is an earth-quake under any of these seven asterisras, it should
be construed as caused by wind). The following symptoms of this
